title: zerna monoclada
intro: Zerna monoclada, also known as Wild Marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which have been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Zerna monoclada include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Zerna monoclada can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
